# Purchase Stock Picking Return Invoicing

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:4a0d36ff6fc61058d18920d87b040ac9595984d86f04dd648890673c69f8739f
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of purchase orders to better manage
supplier returns and refunds.

In the purchase order you are able to display, for each line:

- Billed Quantity and Refunded Quantity, as separate fields.
- Received Quantity and Returned Refundable Quantity, as separate fields.

You have the option to create a vendor bill or a refund. In the bill or refund
the correct quantity will be proposed, based on those fields.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

Case 1: When you return to a supplier some products, and you have not yet
received the bill from the supplier

01. Go to *Purchases > Purchase > Purchase Orders > Create*.
02. Choose a supplier and add a product whose *Control Purchase Bills* is
    *On received quantities*, and input some quantity to purchase.
03. Confirm the purchase order.
04. Go to *Shipment > Validate > Apply* so as to receive the quantities ordered.
05. Press the button *Return*.
06. In the wizard *Reverse Transfer* set *Quantity* to the quantity to be
    returned. Press *Return* to complete the wizard. **IMPORTANT**: You have to
    mark "To refund (Update SO/PO)" check before pressing the button.
07. On the return picking press *Validate > Apply*.
08. Go back to the purchase order. You will notice that the field *Returned
    Qty* is now the quantity that was returned.
09. Press the button *Create Bill* to create the vendor bill.
10. The proposed vendor bill will be proposed for the difference between the
    received and the returned quantity.

Case 2: When you return to a supplier some products, and you have already
received a bill from the supplier.

01. Go to *Purchases > Purchase > Purchase Orders > Create*.
02. Choose a supplier and add a product whose *Control Purchase Bills* is
    *On received quantities*, and input some quantity to purchase.
03. Confirm the purchase order.
04. Go to *Shipment > Validate > Apply* so as to receive the quantities ordered.
05. Go back to the purchase order. Press the button *Create Bill* to create
    the vendor bill.
06. The proposed vendor bill will be proposed for the quantity received. The
    *Billing Status* is now 'Fully Billed'
07. Go to the original incoming shipment
08. Press the button *Return*.
09. In the wizard *Reverse Transfer* set *Quantity* to the quantity to be
    returned. Press *Return* to complete the wizard. **IMPORTANT**: You have to
    mark "To refund (Update SO/PO)" check before pressing the button.
10. On the return picking press *Validate > Apply*.
11. Go back to the purchase order. It will have *Billing Status* as 'Waiting
    Bills'. You will notice that the field *Returned Qty* is now the quantity
    that was returned.
12. Press the button *Refunds* to create the vendor refund bill.
13. The proposed vendor refund bill will be proposed for the quantity that is
    to be refunded.
14. If you back to the purchase order, you will notice that *Billing Status*
    is now 'Fully Billed', even when the quantity ordered does not match
    with the quantity invoiced, because you did return some products.

Remark: If you accept that you will not claim for a refund for the quantity
returned to the supplier, just leave without checking the mark
"To refund (Update SO/PO)" on the return dialog.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-invoicing/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/account-invoicing/issues/new?body=module:%20purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.models.account_invoice.AccountMove._onchange_purchase_auto_complete
documentation: Remove lines with qty=0 when making refunds.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.models.purchase_order.PurchaseOrder._get_invoiced
documentation:
Modify invoice_status for taking into account returned/refunded
qty, as the comparison qty_received vs qty_invoiced can be negative.
It's only needed to modify the method for resetting state to
"to invoice", as the rest of the states are already handled by super.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.models.purchase_order.PurchaseOrder._compute_invoice
documentation:
Change computation for excluding refund invoices.

Make this compatible with other extensions, only subtracting refunds
from the number obtained in super.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.models.purchase_order.PurchaseOrder.action_create_invoice_refund
documentation: Create the refund associated to the PO.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.models.purchase_order.PurchaseOrder.action_view_invoice_refund
documentation:
This function returns an action that display existing vendor refund
bills of given purchase order ids.
When only one found, show the vendor bill immediately.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.models.purchase_order.PurchaseOrder.action_view_invoice
documentation: Change super action for displaying only normal invoices.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.models.purchase_order.PurchaseOrderLine._compute_qty_returned
documentation: Made through read_group for not impacting in performance.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.tests.test_purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.TestPurchaseStockPickingReturnInvoicing.setUpClass
documentation: Add some defaults to let the test run without an accounts chart.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.tests.test_purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.TestPurchaseStockPickingReturnInvoicing.test_purchase_stock_return_1
documentation:
Test a PO with received, invoiced, returned and refunded qty.

Receive and invoice the PO, then do a return of the picking.
Check that the invoicing status of the purchase, and quantities
received and billed are correct throughout the process.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.tests.test_purchase_stock_picking_return_invoicing.TestPurchaseStockPickingReturnInvoicing.test_purchase_stock_return_2
documentation:
Test a PO with received and returned qty, and invoiced after.

Receive the PO, then do a partial return of the picking.
Create a new invoice to get the bill for the remaining qty.
Check that the invoicing status of the purchase, and quantities
received and billed are correct throughout the process.
